hooks.command: f="$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; if echo "$f" | grep -qE 'extraction.*\.json$'; then python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); entries=[e for t in d.get('themes',[]) for c in t.get('countries',[]) for e in c.get('entries',[])]; empty=[e['entry_id'] for e in entries if not e.get('exact_quote','').strip()]; print(f'WARNING: {len(empty)} entries missing exact_quote: {empty[:5]}') if empty else None" "$f" 2>/dev/null; fi
